headline: Leidos to participate in the 2026 J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference
summary: Leidos (NYSE: LDOS) today announced it will participate in J.P. Morgan's 2026 Industrials Conference being held in Washington, D.C.

headline: Microsoft backs Anthropic in Pentagon blacklist battle, urges temporary restraining order
summary: Microsoft threw its support behind Anthropic and advocated for a temporary restraining order to the Pentagon's supply chain risk designation.

headline: C3.ai's Q3 Revenues Decline: Can Restructuring Aid the Stock's Growth?
summary: AI posts $53.3M Q3 revenues as delayed deals weigh on results. Restructuring with 26% headcount cuts aims to reduce costs and reset the growth strategy.

raw.headline: C3.ai's Q3 Revenues Decline: Can Restructuring Aid the Stock's Growth?

headline: Brokers Suggest Investing in Leidos (LDOS): Read This Before Placing a Bet
summary: The average brokerage recommendation (ABR) for Leidos (LDOS) is equivalent to a Buy. The overly optimistic recommendations of Wall Street analysts make the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric questionable. So, is it worth buying the stock?

headline: Google deepens Pentagon AI push after Anthropic sues Trump administration
summary: Google is rolling out a feature that lets civilian and military personnel build custom AI agents for unclassified work on the Pentagon's enterprise AI portal.

raw.headline: Google deepens Pentagon AI push after Anthropic sues Trump administration

headline: Leidos, Dropzone AI to accelerate federal agencies' cyber responses
summary: Leidos (NYSE: LDOS) is partnering with Dropzone AI to help U.S. federal agencies respond to cyber threats faster and with less strain on their teams.

headline: RTX's Pratt & Whitney awarded follow-on contract to supply TJ150 engines for Leidos' small cruise missile
summary: Pratt & Whitney, an RTX (NYSE: RTX) business, was awarded a follow-on contract from Leidos Dynetics to supply TJ150 engines for their AGM-190A small cruise missile.
